name: US CPI Headline (BLS direct, SA)
notes: BLS series CUSR0000SA0 — CPI-U all items SA. Ultimate source for the same series FRED republishes as CPIAUCSL; shares the canonical column so the freshness/ultimate-source merge prefers BLS, with FRED as automatic fallback. Verified live keyless 2026-05-29 (332.407 @ 2026-04).

name: US Core CPI ex Food & Energy (BLS direct, SA)
notes: BLS series CUSR0000SA0L1E — CPI-U less food & energy SA. Ultimate source for FRED CPILFESL; shares the canonical column (FRED fallback). Verified live keyless 2026-05-29 (335.423 @ 2026-04).

name: US Unemployment Rate (BLS direct, SA)
notes: BLS series LNS14000000 — civilian unemployment rate SA (CPS). Ultimate source for FRED UNRATE; shares the canonical column (FRED fallback). Verified live keyless 2026-05-29 (4.3% @ 2026-04).

name: US Average Hourly Earnings Total Private (SA)
notes: BLS series CES0500000003 — average hourly earnings of all employees total private SA (CES). No FRED-library equivalent column; genuine coverage gap. Verified live keyless 2026-05-29 (37.41 @ 2026-04).
